task_completion.description: Agent navigates to the sagittal view to visualize the spine profile for assessment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D Slicer interface shows the Yellow slice view (Sagittal) maximized or clearly visible, displaying the spinal column from the side (profile view).

task_completion.description: Agent places ruler markups to measure anterior and posterior disc heights at the L4-L5 level.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Visible ruler lines (Markups) drawn across the intervertebral disc space (the gap between vertebrae). Ideally, two distinct lines are visible in the disc space (one near the front/anterior, one near the back/posterior).

task_completion.description: Agent places a ruler markup to measure the vertebral body height for normalization.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A ruler line visible measuring the vertical height of a vertebral bone block itself, distinct from the lines measuring the gap between bones.

task_completion.description: Agent generates or types out the report data including measurements, DHI calculation, and classification.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, terminal, or python console showing JSON content with keys such as 'disc_height_index', 'degeneration_grade', 'mean_disc_height_mm', or 'anterior_height_mm'.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the measurement markups and report JSON to the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File explorer or 'Save' dialog showing 'disc_measurements.mrk.json' and 'disc_report.json' located in '~/Documents/SlicerData/AMOS/'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent uses the 3D Slicer GUI Markups tool to measure rather than estimating or guessing.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the 3D Slicer application window with the Markups module active or ruler lines physically drawn on the scan image.

integrity.description: Verify the agent calculates values based on the image rather than entering arbitrary numbers.
integrity.visual_evidence: The report generation step should follow the measurement step; the agent should not simply echo a JSON string with values without having placed measurement rulers on the image first.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is using the actual 3D Slicer application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface shown in screenshots matches the standard 3D Slicer medical imaging software layout.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target assessment level is L4-L5. Normal anatomical ranges for this level are: Anterior disc height ~10-19mm, Posterior disc height ~7-10mm, Vertebral body height ~25-35mm. DHI is calculated as (Anterior + Posterior) / (2 * Vertebral Height). Degeneration is classified based on DHI: Normal > 0.40, Mild 0.30-0.40, Moderate 0.20-0.30, Severe < 0.20.
